operation: First, create a CadQuery workplane aligned to the XY reference plane. Then generate a partial spherical feature on this workplane with a radius of 10 units, constrained by three angular parameters: angle1 set to 45 degrees, angle2 set to 90 degrees, and angle3 set to 90 degrees, to produce the final spherical wedge geometry.
geometry: The model is a wedge-shaped segment of a sphere, composed of a single convex curved spherical outer surface, two mutually perpendicular flat planar faces that meet at a sharp upper apex, and a curved base edge forming a quarter-circle arc that lies on the XY plane.
function: This 90-degree partial spherical wedge is intended for use as a corner fitting, curved contact element, optical reflector segment, or test component for validating spherical surface manufacturing processes.
